description: You are a Construction Planner tasked with creating a 3D site logistics plan around the pre-loaded FZK-Haus residential building IFC model. Review the project brief on the Desktop for requirements. Model a tower crane classified as an IfcTransportElement with PredefinedType set to CRANE. Model a swing radius as an IfcBuildingElementProxy named 'Crane Swing Radius'. Create site hoarding consisting of at least 4 distinct elements forming a perimeter fence. Organize the crane, swing radius, and hoarding into an IfcGroup named 'Site Logistics'. Save the updated IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_site_logistics.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65, full score requires grouping elements successfully
